items.title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
items.summary: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.

items.title: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
items.summary: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.

items.title: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
items.summary: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 非洲行最後1站赤道幾內亞 良十四世緬懷方濟各
items.summary: 天主教教宗良十四世今天搭乘專機從安哥拉前往赤道幾內亞，展開非洲訪問行程的最後一站。他在專機上緬懷逝世1周年的方濟各教宗，稱他對教會和世界而言是份禮物。  良十四世（Leo XIV）近來頻...…

items.title: 見到中國船隻「偷載給伊朗禮物」 川普也驚訝
items.summary: 美國總統川普21日接受訪問，表示美軍攔下一艘船隻，載著「來自中國要給伊朗的禮物」，他還說德黑蘭大概進行了一些補給。不過，不清楚川普所指的船隻是哪一艘。  根據《美國有線電視...…

items.title: 日7旬婦錯將秋水仙當行者大蒜誤食身亡 辨別方法：味道與根部顏色
items.summary: 日本有位70歲女性因誤食有毒植物「秋水仙」，她原是想食用外觀與之相似的北海道特產「行者大蒜」，卻引發食物中毒，不幸身亡。  《札幌電視台》報導，札幌市保健所說明，死者於本月8...…
